reasoning_chain: The road has no center line and yellow reflective posts on both sides, typical of Icelandic rural roads (F-roads or low-numbered highways).
The landscape features flat grassy plains, distant fjords, and barren hills — characteristic of Iceland’s coastal lowlands.
Buildings in the distance are simple, low-rise structures with flat roofs, consistent with Icelandic rural settlements.
